desc: Processors silently pass unsupported values through, so the NumberProcessor step is skipped after StringProcessor returns a string, masking incompatible pipeline composition.
NumberProcessor uses isinstance(data, int), which also accepts booleans and transforms True and False as the integers 1 and 0.
StringProcessor repeatedly concatenates immutable strings in a loop, causing potentially quadratic runtime and allocation overhead for large inputs.
Non-alphabetic characters are converted to delimiter-free decimal code points, allowing distinct inputs to produce the same output.
The configuration logic uses four nested conditionals, making control flow unnecessarily difficult to understand and maintain.
add_step accepts arbitrary objects without validating a processor interface, so run can fail at runtime with an AttributeError.
